radius.$description: Border radius for tab item - 4px (applied to top corners only for line tabs)

bottom.$description: Bottom border width for active tab state - 2px

default.$description: Default border width for tab item - 1px

xs.$description: Horizontal padding for xs tab item - 8px

sm.$description: Horizontal padding for sm tab item - 8px

md.$description: Horizontal padding for md tab item - 8px

lg.$description: Horizontal padding for lg tab item - 8px

xs.$description: Vertical padding for xs tab item - 4px

sm.$description: Vertical padding for sm tab item - 4px

md.$description: Vertical padding for md tab item - 4px

lg.$description: Vertical padding for lg tab item - 4px

min-width.$description: Minimum width for tab item to ensure adequate clickable area - 64px

width.$description: Width of the focus ring around tab item - 2px

offset.$description: Offset distance of focus ring from tab item border - 4px

default.$description: Default background for primary tab - transparent (no background)

hover.$description: Background when hovering over primary tab - light blue (#EFF4FF)

active.$description: Background for active primary tab - white/neutral base

focused.$description: Background when primary tab is focused - light blue (#EFF4FF)

disabled.$description: Background for disabled primary tab - transparent

default.$description: Default bottom border for primary tab - transparent (no border)

hover.$description: Bottom border when hovering over primary tab - light primary

active.$description: Bottom border for active primary tab - primary blue (#004EEB) 2px

focused.$description: Bottom border when primary tab is focused - light primary

disabled.$description: Bottom border for disabled primary tab - transparent

default.$description: Default side borders for primary tab - transparent (line tabs have no side borders)

hover.$description: Side borders on hover for primary tab - transparent

active.$description: Side borders for active primary tab - transparent

focused.$description: Side borders when primary tab is focused - transparent

disabled.$description: Side borders for disabled primary tab - transparent

default.$description: Default text color for primary tab - gray.600 (#475467)

hover.$description: Text color when hovering over primary tab - darker gray (#1D2939)

active.$description: Text color for active primary tab - primary blue (#004EEB), weight changes to Semibold

focused.$description: Text color when primary tab is focused - darker gray (#1D2939)

disabled.$description: Text color for disabled primary tab - lighter gray (inactive)

ring.$description: Focus ring color for primary tab - light primary blue

default.$description: Default icon color for primary tab - matches text color

hover.$description: Icon color when hovering over primary tab - darker shade

active.$description: Icon color for active primary tab - primary blue (#004EEB)

focused.$description: Icon color when primary tab is focused - darker shade

disabled.$description: Icon color for disabled primary tab - subtle/faded
